title: Everything Maths Grade 10
author: Siyavula Education
subject: mathematics
description: A comprehensive, CAPS-aligned Mathematics textbook for Grade 10. Covers algebraic expressions, equations and inequalities, exponents, trigonometry, Euclidean geometry, measurement, statistics, and probability — with full worked examples, exercises, and answers. Freely available under a Creative Commons licence.

title: Everything Maths Grade 11
author: Siyavula Education
subject: mathematics
description: A complete CAPS-aligned Mathematics textbook for Grade 11. Covers exponents and surds, equations and inequalities, number patterns, analytical geometry, trigonometry, Euclidean geometry, measurement, finance, statistics, and probability. Includes worked examples and graded exercises throughout.

title: Everything Maths Grade 12
author: Siyavula Education
subject: mathematics
description: The complete CAPS-aligned Mathematics textbook for Grade 12 (Matric). Covers sequences and series, functions, finance, trigonometry, polynomials, differential calculus, probability, and counting principles — essential preparation for the NSC. Freely downloadable in PDF format.

title: Everything Science Grade 10
author: Siyavula Education
subject: physical-sciences
description: A complete CAPS-aligned Physical Sciences textbook for Grade 10. Covers Physics topics (mechanics, waves, electromagnetic radiation, matter) and Chemistry topics (classification of matter, states of matter, reactions, acids and bases) — with experiments, worked examples, and exercises.

title: Everything Science Grade 11
author: Siyavula Education
subject: physical-sciences
description: A comprehensive CAPS-aligned Physical Sciences textbook for Grade 11. Covers vectors, Newton's laws, atomic combinations, intermolecular forces, ideal gases, quantitative aspects of chemical change, and electrochemistry — with full worked examples and graded exercises.

title: Everything Science Grade 12
author: Siyavula Education
subject: physical-sciences
description: The complete CAPS-aligned Physical Sciences textbook for Grade 12 (Matric). Covers momentum and impulse, work and energy, electric circuits, organic chemistry, chemical equilibrium, electrochemical reactions, and optical phenomena — essential for NSC success. Freely downloadable in PDF.

title: Mind the Gap: Mathematics
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: mathematics
description: The official DBE Grade 12 Mathematics study guide. Targeted NSC exam revision covering all key CAPS topics — functions, calculus, sequences, trigonometry, statistics, and probability — with practice questions, model answers, common mistakes, and exam tips.

title: Mind the Gap: Physical Sciences — Physics
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: physical-sciences
description: The official DBE Grade 12 Physical Sciences study guide — Physics section. Covers mechanics, electricity, electromagnetism, optical phenomena, and Doppler effect with exam-focused explanations, worked examples, practice questions, and model answers aligned to the NSC.

title: Mind the Gap: Physical Sciences — Chemistry
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: physical-sciences
description: The official DBE Grade 12 Physical Sciences study guide — Chemistry section. Covers organic chemistry, chemical equilibrium, acids and bases, electrochemical reactions, and fertilisers — with NSC exam tips, worked examples, practice questions, and model answers.

title: Mind the Gap: Life Sciences
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: life-sciences
description: The official DBE Grade 12 Life Sciences study guide. Covers DNA and RNA, meiosis, genetics and inheritance, evolution, human reproduction, and the nervous and endocrine systems — all CAPS NSC topics with exam tips, worked examples, and model answers.

title: Mind the Gap: Accounting
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: accounting
description: The official DBE Grade 12 Accounting study guide. Covers financial statements, cash flow, manufacturing, companies, cost accounting, and ethics — all key NSC exam topics with practice questions, model answers, common errors, and exam techniques.

title: Mind the Gap: Economics
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: economics
description: The official DBE Grade 12 Economics study guide. Covers macroeconomics, microeconomics, economic development, economic growth, and contemporary economic issues — with definitions, essay frameworks, practice questions, and model answers for the NSC.

title: Mind the Gap: Geography
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: geography
description: The official DBE Grade 12 Geography study guide. Covers geomorphology, climate and weather, settlement geography, economic geography, and geographical skills including map work — all NSC topics with diagrams, practice questions, and model answers.

title: Business Studies Grade 10 Learner's Book
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: business-studies
description: The official DBE CAPS-aligned Business Studies learner's book for Grade 10. Covers business environments, forms of ownership, human rights and inclusivity, business functions, financial literacy, and entrepreneurship — the full Grade 10 curriculum in one volume.

title: Business Studies Grade 11 Learner's Book
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: business-studies
description: The official DBE CAPS-aligned Business Studies learner's book for Grade 11. Covers business environments, business operations, business roles, human resources management, financial management, and marketing — the complete Grade 11 curriculum.

title: Business Studies Grade 12 Learner's Book
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: business-studies
description: The official DBE CAPS-aligned Business Studies learner's book for Grade 12 (Matric). Covers business environments, business operations, business roles, ethics and professionalism, investment, and exam preparation. Complete NSC curriculum in one volume.

title: History Paper 1 Self-Study Guide — Grade 12
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: history
description: The official DBE self-study revision guide for Grade 12 History Paper 1. Covers the Cold War, the Civil Rights Movement in the USA, and decolonisation in Africa — all NSC Paper 1 topics — with source analysis guidance, essay frameworks, and model answers.

title: History Paper 2 Self-Study Guide — Grade 12
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: history
description: The official DBE self-study revision guide for Grade 12 History Paper 2. Covers the South African liberation struggle, the transition to democracy, and South Africa's place in the world — all NSC Paper 2 topics with source analysis guidance, essay frameworks, and model answers.

title: Mind the Gap: English HL — Hamlet
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: english
description: The official DBE Mind the Gap guide for Grade 12 English Home Language — Shakespeare's Hamlet. Covers plot summary, character analysis, themes, motifs, language devices, and prescribed essay questions. Includes model answers and exam tips for the NSC.

title: Mind the Gap: English HL — Life of Pi
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: english
description: The official DBE Mind the Gap guide for Grade 12 English Home Language — Yann Martel's Life of Pi. Covers chapter summaries, character analysis, themes, symbolism, and prescribed essay and contextual question types. Includes exam tips and model answers for the NSC.

title: Mind the Gap: English HL — Imagined Worlds
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: english
description: The official DBE Mind the Gap guide for Grade 12 English Home Language — the Imagined Worlds poetry and short stories anthology. Covers prescribed poems, short stories, themes, and literary devices with exam guidance, contextual question strategies, and model answers.

title: Mind the Gap: Afrikaans HL — Onderwêreld
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: afrikaans
description: The official DBE Mind the Gap guide for Grade 12 Afrikaans Home Language — the prescribed prose work Onderwêreld. Covers plot, characters, themes, language use, and essay question strategies. Includes model answers and exam tips aligned to NSC requirements.

title: Mind the Gap: Afrikaans HL — Poësie
author: Department of Basic Education
subject: afrikaans
description: The official DBE Mind the Gap guide for Grade 12 Afrikaans Home Language — prescribed poetry. Covers all set poems with detailed analysis of themes, imagery, tone, and language devices. Includes annotation guides, contextual question strategies, and model answers for the NSC.
